'''Tarrence Chenati''' was the ''alias'' of a spy who infiltrated the [[Jedi Starfighter Corps|Jedi Starfighter Program]] in order to sabotage it. A former member of the [[Senate Bureau of Intelligence/Legends|Senate Bureau of Intelligence]], though he was reported to have died in [[62 BBY/Legends|62 BBY]], his identity was reactivated in [[42 BBY/Legends|42 BBY]] by the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]]. It remains unclear whether his "death" was a falsely-reported cover-up to hide his continued existence, or whether the second spy was a different person entirely, merely using the name of Tarrence Chenati. Although discovered by [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Tahl]] trying to sabotage [[Clee Rhara]]'s starfighters, Chenati escaped, but his mission was ultimately successful, as the Jedi starfighter program was soon shut down. Though Chenati disappeared for several decades, he reappeared under a new alias, "Kern" — a mechanic who caused havoc aboard the ''[[BioCruiser]]''.
